title: TIE Fire
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''TIE Fire''''' was a group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Corvette/Legends|Corvettes]] that were destroyed in [[Operation Blunt Stick]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
